items.title: 'BTS is everything for us': K-pop fans gather in Seoul for comeback show
items.dek: Some 260,000 fans are expected to watch BTS perform together on Saturday for the first time since 2022.
items.body: Some 260,000 fans are expected to watch BTS perform together on Saturday for the first time since 2022.
